data.title: WEX Inc. to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 22, 2026
data.description: Headquartered in Portland, Maine, WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX) will be releasing their first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, after the market closes. The company, known for its intelligent payment solutions, will provide a press release and supplemental materials detailing its first-quarter performance. These materials will be accessible through the investor relations section of the WEX website, www.wexinc.com, on the same day. Investors and stakeholders can expect to have access to this information by Thursday, April [insert date].

data.title: Omdia: Global PC Shipments Grew 3% in 1Q26 as Supply Chain Impacts Emerged
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, the total shipments of desktops, notebooks, and workstations increased by 3.2% compared to the previous year, reaching a total of 64.8 million units worldwide. Notebooks, which include mobile workstations, experienced a slight year-over-year growth of 2.6%, with 50.8 million units shipped in Q1. On the other hand, desktops, including desktop workstations, outperformed notebooks with a growth rate of 5.4%, totaling 14.0 million units shipped during the same period. This growth was driven by vendors and channel partners advancing orders in anticipation of future demand.

data.title: For Women Managing Nighttime Incontinence, Better Sleep and Comfort Start with BD® PureWick® Urine Collection System
data.description: Recently, the Journal of Clinical Medicine featured a study showing the convenience and comfort of using the BD PureWick® Female External Catheter. This product by BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) helps in improving sleep quality. The study findings were published on April 9, 2026, out of Franklin Lakes, N.J. BD is a prominent company listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol BDX.

data.title: Labcorp Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Labcorp Holdings Inc., a prominent provider of laboratory services worldwide, revealed today that its Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.72 per common stock share. This announcement was made on April 9, 2026, in Burlington, North Carolina. Labcorp Holdings Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the symbol LH.

data.title: Kiddopia Nominated for Best Kids & Family App at the 30th Annual Webby Awards
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, Kiddopia, the acclaimed educational app for children, has just been selected as a finalist for Best Kids & Family App in the Apps, Software & Immersive section at the prestigious 30th Annual Webby Awards. Known as the "Internet’s highest honor" according to The New York Times, The Webby Awards, overseen by the International Academy of Digital Arts and Sciences (IADAS), is a renowned global awards platform that recognizes outstanding achievements on the Internet. Kiddopia's nomination highlights its success and recognition within the industry.

data.title: Foundayo™ (orforglipron), Lilly's new oral GLP-1 pill for weight loss, now available in the U.S.
data.description: Foundayo can now be purchased through LillyDirect® and telehealth services, and is being distributed to retail pharmacies across the country. Known as the sole GLP-1 pill for weight loss, it can be consumed at any time of day without the need for food or water restrictions. The starting price for Foundayo is $25 monthly with commercial insurance coverage, and $149 for those without insurance.

data.title: Is A Market Turn Coming? Kobeissi Letter Spots Ominous Drop In Billionaire-Favored Stocks
data.description: A market observer, The Kobeissi Letter, has highlighted a discrepancy in stock markets where companies heavily favored by U.S. billionaires are performing worse compared to the broader S&P 500 index. This phenomenon, according to The Kobeissi Letter, has historically indicated a forthcoming upswing in market performance. The analysis revealed that the ratio between the Bloomberg U.S. Billionaires Investment Index and the S&P 500 has dropped to 0.41, marking its lowest point since April 2025. The Bloomberg U.S. Billionaires Investment Index monitors the top 50 U.S.-listed stocks preferred by American billionaires. The underperformance of the wealthiest Americans' stock portfolios is evident in the declining ratio, as highlighted by The Kobeissi Letter. This observation was shared on Twitter by The Kobeissi Letter account on April 8, 2026. The commentator pointed out that the decreasing ratio signifies... More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Jacobs Secures Contracts to Improve Travel on Chicago’s I-290 Corridor
data.description: Jacobs, a leading company in infrastructure improvements, has been selected to enhance travel on the I-290 Corridor in Chicago. This project aims to bolster resilience and safety on this crucial part of the US multimodal network. The upgrades are expected to significantly improve transportation conditions for commuters and travelers.

data.title: Everything Blockchain (OTC: EBZT) Acquires 10% Stake in NoLimit Foundation
data.description: Everything Blockchain, Inc. (OTC: EBZT) has revealed its acquisition of a 10% ownership interest in NoLimit Foundation. NoLimit Foundation is engaged in the development of private AI infrastructure.
